name: build-html-slides
description: Codex skill and plugin for art-directed, validated HTML presentations.

scripts.test: cd codex/skills/build-html-slides && python3 -m unittest discover -s scripts -p 'test_*.py'
scripts.test:unit: cd codex/skills/build-html-slides && python3 -m unittest scripts.test_source_cache scripts.test_validate_deck scripts.test_validate_interactions scripts.test_validate_visual_review
